column1: Supplementary Materials: The following are available online at https://www.mdpi.com/article/10
.3390/nano11092438/s1, Table S1: Average particle size, polydispersity index, zeta potential, and
entrapment efﬁciency % of the prepared H/CS/PLGA NPs formulations, Table S2: Composition
and sonication time of the 33 BBD for H/CS/PLGA NPs, Figure S1: Representing images for the
in vitro scratch wound healing assay using human skin ﬁbroblasts cultured on polystyrene plates for
(A) H/CS/PLGA NPs, (B) free HARF, and (C) CS/PLGA blank NPs. Images were taken using an
inverted microscope at 0, 24, and 48 h. The experiment has been conducted in triplicates. Vertical
black lines in all panels indicate scratch size.
